author: y4rr
content: gpu-D2 surfaced 3 additional sibling copy-paste-error sites: gpu_fill_f32 reports kernel: 'scale_kernel' instead of 'fill_f32_kernel'; gpu_transpose_2d_into reports kernel: 'scatter_add_rows_kernel' instead of 'transpose_2d_kernel'; gpu_log_softmax_f64 reports kernel: 'softmax_backward_kernel' instead of 'log_softmax_f64_kernel'. Combined with original site at gpu_scatter_add_1d:11743 (plus likely gpu_index_select_1d sibling), cluster is now 5+ known wrong-kernel-name PtxCompileFailed sites. Recommend single sweep dispatch after gpu-F.
